visual: Steps diagonally into a bow stance with one hand guarding above the forehead palm-out and the other pushing forward at chest height, repeated to alternating corners.
motion_description: The movement begins with a weight shift backward as the arms loosely cross in front of the chest. The torso then pivots approximately 180 degrees to the left, followed by the left foot stepping into a diagonal bow stance. As weight transfers onto the bent front left leg, the left arm sweeps upward to guard above the forehead with the palm facing outward, while the right hand simultaneously pushes forward at chest level in a slow, steady flow.
